notableMoments: Made their World Cup debut in 2006 and reached the Round of 16
Agonizing quarter-final exit in 2010 after Suárez's deliberate handball on the line
Asamoah Gyan's missed penalty in the last minute of extra time vs Uruguay in 2010
Were minutes away from becoming the first African team to reach a World Cup semi-final
Mohammed Kudus emerged as a new star at the 2022 World Cup
Known as the 'Black Stars' - one of Africa's most storied football nations
